voicePractice.readScript: Read the script aloud and clearly to receive instant feedback on your performance.
voicePractice.pastAttemptsDesc: Review your previous attempts and track your vocal improvement over time.
voicePractice.clarityDesc: How accurately you pronounced the words compared to the script. Higher score means clearer delivery.
voicePractice.energyDesc: Variation in volume and rhythm. Shows emotional expression and the power behind your delivery.
voicePractice.paceDesc: The rate of speech measured in words per minute. Ideal MC pace is typically 130-150 WPM.
voicePractice.recordToUnlock: Record your practice session to unlock detailed technical reports and coaching insights.
voicePractice.aiListening: AI is listening to your voice...
voicePractice.overallScoreDesc: Your overall score is calculated based on Clarity (45%), Energy (35%), and Pace (20%).
voicePractice.coverageDesc: Percentage of the script you successfully delivered compared to the total words.
voicePractice.paceSummaryDesc: Your average speaking rate. Professional MCs adjust pace based on the venue and content.
voicePractice.micAccessDenied: Microphone access denied. Please check your settings.
voicePractice.mentorDesc: Get personalized feedback from professional MC mentors.

dashboard.trackProgress: Track your vocal training progress for today.
dashboard.noSessions: No training sessions found for these filters.
dashboard.masterDesc: Master level. Complete 5 more practices for Platinum certification.
dashboard.newAmbassadorDesc: New Ambassador. Complete your first practices to earn badges.
dashboard.speedExcellent: Your speaking speed is excellent. Keep it up!

voiceLibrary.description: Practice with premium scripts and get instant AI feedback on accuracy, rhythm, and speaking pace. Master the voice, master the stage.
voiceLibrary.aiCoachingDesc: Our AI analyzes your voice using 80 Mel filters and Whisper models to provide professional analytics.

home.heroSubtitle: Revolutionize your MC career with real-time vocal analysis and elevate your speaking skills with our AI-powered training platform.
home.coreAdvantageDesc: We've combined AI technology with professional industry standards to build the ultimate playground for MCs.
home.rhythmCoachDesc: Our AI analyzes your pace and tone to help you sync perfectly with any event atmosphere.
home.realTimeFeedbackDesc: Receive instant scores on pronunciation, speed, and emotional delivery to improve faster.
home.extensiveLibraryDesc: Access hundreds of professional scripts across various event categories, from weddings to corporate galas.
home.premiumVoicesDesc: Spotlight on this month's most trending MC talents.
home.step1Desc: Record your voice and get instant AI metrics on your performance.
home.step2Desc: Monitor your improvement over time with detailed analytics and personalized recommendations.
home.step3Desc: Build confidence and deliver flawless performances for any event script.
home.ctaDesc: Join the elite community of 500+ MCs who have elevated their careers with MCHub. Don't just speak, make an impact.

settings.manageAccount: Manage your account details, security preferences, and notification settings.
settings.portraitDesc: This will be displayed on your profile
settings.dragDropPhotos: Drag & drop or click to select multiple photos
settings.interfaceLanguageDesc: Select your preferred language for the system interface.
settings.passwordSecurityDesc: Ensure your account is protected with a strong password.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
settings.notificationDesc: Control how you receive updates and activity from MC Hub.
settings.emailNotifDesc: Important updates sent to your inbox
settings.notifNewMessagesDesc: Receive email alerts for new chat messages.
settings.notifPaymentUpdatesDesc: Get notified about escrow and payout activity.
settings.notifChatMessagesDesc: Instant notification when you get a message.

voiceReport.clarityDesc: How accurately you pronounced the words compared to the script.
voiceReport.energyDesc: Variation in volume and delivery rhythm.
voiceReport.paceDesc: The rate of speech measured in words per minute. Ideal: 130-150 WPM.
voiceReport.overallScoreDesc: Your overall score is based on Clarity (45%), Energy (35%), and Pace (20%).

footer.tagline: The #1 platform for professional MCs and event organizers. Connecting talent with opportunities since 2024.

voiceAnalyzer.evaluatingVocal: Evaluating your vocal frequency, articulation peaks, and emotional resonance.
voiceAnalyzer.micAccessError: Could not access microphone. Please check permissions.
voiceAnalyzer.serverError: Server connection failed. Ensure AI Service is running.

auth.onboardingNotice: After registration, you will continue to the profile setup wizard to complete your onboarding as an MC.

auth.resetSuccessDesc: Your password has been updated successfully.

auth.nowCanSignIn: You can now use your new password to sign in.

onboarding.setupDesc: Let's set up your professional MC profile and verify your portfolio.

about.storyDesc: Where technology meets human emotion. We are redefining how the world finds its voice.
about.quote: The stage belongs to everyone, but the spotlight is for those with passion and mastery.
about.solvingGapDesc: Organizers often struggle to find high-quality, verified MCs for their events. Meanwhile, vocal talents lack a platform to showcase skills and practice effectively.
about.communityImpactDesc: We provide MCs with AI-powered coaching tools to master their craft, while building a trusted marketplace that drives the global event economy.
about.ourPassionDesc: At our core, we are event lovers. We believe a great MC doesn't just host an event—they create a memory that lasts a lifetime.
about.teamDesc: Meet the creators, dreamers, and builders behind The MC Hub.

learning.title: Career Roadmap
learning.description: Your professional journey is unique. Track your stage progress, complete core modules, and unlock high-tier event opportunities.
learning.mentorshipDesc: Get 1-on-1 coaching from industry leaders. Review your scripts and stage presence with the best.
